invalidation.description: Daily close below 388 weakens the breakout thesis

AVGO.thesis: Confirmed Apple ASIC agreement through 2031 plus custom-silicon (OpenAI, Google, Meta, Anthropic) and AI networking exposure
AVGO.strongest_counterargument: Valuation and customer concentration (four named hyperscalers driving most XPU revenue) remain elevated

entry_condition.breakout_volume_condition: hold above 200 intraday and close above 205

invalidation.description: Daily close below 199 signals the China H200 news failed to hold as a durable catalyst

NVDA.thesis: Reported (unconfirmed/unlicensed) China easing on H200 sales to select AI firms; training-only use, sub-200K unit cap reported
NVDA.strongest_counterargument: Policy reporting is not a signed license; China has reversed or slow-walked similar signals before
